name: worktrunk
description: Worktrunk is a CLI for Git worktree management, designed for parallel AI agent workflows. This plugin provides configuration guidance and automatic activity tracking for Codex sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Git worktree workflows for parallel Codex sessions.
interface.longDescription: Use Worktrunk from Codex to manage linked worktrees, set up LLM commit workflows, configure hooks, and show active Codex sessions in wt list.
